details.description: Code change shipped: .github/workflows/ci.yml on: block contains schedule cron '13 7 * * *' alongside push.branches=[main], pull_request, merge_group, workflow_dispatch; new file tests/unit/scripts/ci/__init__.py with SPDX header; new file tests/unit/scripts/ci/test_detect_test_paths.py with 2 schedule-escalation tests — receipt at drift/dod_receipts/OMN-9855/dod-001/
